expectations.text: The decision says `prd_file` is official source of truth and `progress_file` is supplemental.
expectations.evidence:
1. Source of truth: `prd_file` official; `progress_file` supplemental resume data only.
2. Resolved `progress_file`: `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/progress.txt`.
3. Active wave: `parallelBatch` 2; ready story IDs `US-002`, `US-003`.
4. Before any story-specific repo discovery, recheck parallel safety for current wave using only `filesLikelyTouched` and owner-surface boundaries; dispatch fresh implementer per parallel-safe story and serialize any overlap case first.
